steps.title: Modeling the cost structure
steps.content:
The equipment rental cost has a first-day charge (\$64n) and additional daily charges (\$32n per day beyond the first).

For $ x $ days, the first day is charged, and the remaining $ x-1 $ days incur \$32n each. Total cost formula: $$ 64n + 32n(x - 1) $$ Simplify: $$ 64n + 32nx - 32n = 32n + 32nx = 32nx + 32n $$

steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice A (32nx + 32n)
steps.content: Plug in $ x = 1 $ (first day only): $$ C(1) = 32n(1) + 32n = 64n $$ Matches the given \$64n for the first day. For $ x = 2 $: $$ C(2) = 32n(2) + 32n = 96n $$ Which is \$64n (first day) + 32n (second day). Correct. That matches choice A — A is correct.
